name: metar

metadata.name: metar
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Metar - a package to parse METAR-coded weather reports

documentation:
Metar is a python package for interpreting METAR and SPECI weather reports.

METAR is an international format for reporting weather observations.
The standard specification for the METAR and SPECI codes is given
in the WMO Manual on Codes, vol I.1, Part A (WMO-306 I.i.A).  US
conventions for METAR/SPECI reports are described in chapter 12 of
the Federal Meteorological Handbook No.1. (FMC-H1-2017), issued by
NOAA.  See http://www.ofcm.gov/publications/fmh/FMH1/FMH1.pdf

This module extracts the data recorded in the main-body groups of
reports that follow the WMO spec or the US conventions, except for
the runway state and trend groups, which are parsed but ignored.
The most useful remark groups defined in the US spec are parsed,
as well, such as the cumulative precipitation, min/max temperature,
peak wind and sea-level pressure groups.  No other regional conventions
are formally supported, but a large number of variant formats found
in international reports are accepted.

modules.name: metar
documentation:
A python package for interpreting METAR and SPECI weather reports.

US conventions for METAR/SPECI reports are described in chapter 12 of
the Federal Meteorological Handbook No.1. (FMH-1 1995), issued by NOAA.
See http://www.ofcm.gov/publications/fmh/FMH1/FMH1.pdf

International conventions for the METAR and SPECI codes are specified in
the WMO Manual on Codes, vol I.1, Part A (WMO-306 I.i.A).

This module handles a reports that follow the US conventions, as well
the more general encodings in the WMO spec.  Other regional conventions
are not supported at present.

The current METAR report for a given station is available at the URL
http://weather.noaa.gov/pub/data/observations/metar/stations/<station>.TXT
where <station> is the four-letter ICAO station code.

The METAR reports for all reporting stations for any "cycle" (i.e., hour)
in the last 24 hours is available in a single file at the URL
http://weather.noaa.gov/pub/data/observations/metar/cycles/<cycle>Z.TXT
where <cycle> is a 2-digit cycle number (e.g., "00", "05" or "23").
Copyright (c) 2004,2018 Python-Metar Developers.
Distributed under the terms of the BSD 2-Clause License.
SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-2-Clause

Calculate the initial direction to another location.  (The direction
typically changes as you trace the great circle path to that location.)
See <http://www.movable-type.co.uk/scripts/LatLong.html>.
A class representing a location on the earth's surface.

modules.name: metar.Metar

This module defines the Metar class.

A Metar object represents the weather report encoded by a single METAR code.

classes.name: metar.Metar.Metar

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.__init__
documentation:
Parse raw METAR code.

# Parameters

metarcode : str
month, year : int, optional

> Date values to be used when parsing a non-current METAR code. If not
> provided, then the month and year are guessed from the current date.

utcdelta

: An int of hours or a timedelta object used to specify the timezone.

strict

: This option determines if a `ParserError` is raised when
  unparsable groups are found or an unexpected exception is encountered.
  Setting this to `False` will prevent exceptions from being raised and
  only generate warning messages.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.decode_completed
documentation: Indicate whether the decoding was complete for non-remark elements.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleType
documentation:
Parse the report-type group.

The following attributes are set:
    type   [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleCorrection
documentation:
Parse the correction group.

The following attributes are set:
    correction   [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleStation
documentation:
Parse the station id group.

The following attributes are set:
    station_id   [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleModifier
documentation:
Parse the report-modifier group.

The following attributes are set:
    mod   [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleTime
documentation:
Parse the observation-time group.

The following attributes are set:
    time   [datetime]
    cycle  [int]
    _day   [int]
    _hour  [int]
    _min   [int]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleWind
documentation:
Parse the wind and variable-wind groups.

The following attributes are set:
    wind_dir           [direction]
    wind_speed         [speed]
    wind_gust          [speed]
    wind_dir_from      [int]
    wind_dir_to        [int]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleVisibility
documentation:
Parse the minimum and maximum visibility groups.

The following attributes are set:
    vis          [distance]
    vis_dir      [direction]
    max_vis      [distance]
    max_vis_dir  [direction]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleRunway
documentation:
Parse a runway visual range group.

The following attributes are set:
    range   [list of tuples]
    . name  [string]
    . low   [distance]
    . high  [distance]
    . unit  [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleWeather
documentation:
Parse a present-weather group.

The following attributes are set:
    weather    [list of tuples]
    .  intensity     [string]
    .  description   [string]
    .  precipitation [string]
    .  obscuration   [string]
    .  other         [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleSky
documentation:
Parse a sky-conditions group.

The following attributes are set:
    sky        [list of tuples]
    .  cover   [string]
    .  height  [distance]
    .  cloud   [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleTemp
documentation:
Parse a temperature-dewpoint group.

The following attributes are set:
    temp    temperature (Celsius) [float]
    dewpt   dew point (Celsius) [float]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handlePressure
documentation:
Parse an altimeter-pressure group.

The following attributes are set:
    press    [int]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleRecent
documentation:
Parse a recent-weather group.

The following attributes are set:
    weather    [list of tuples]
    .  intensity     [string]
    .  description   [string]
    .  precipitation [string]
    .  obscuration   [string]
    .  other         [string]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleWindShear
documentation:
Parse wind-shear groups.

The following attributes are set:
    windshear    [list of strings]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleColor
documentation:
Parse (and ignore) the color groups.

The following attributes are set:
    trend    [list of strings]

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._handleRunwayState
documentation:
Parse (and ignore) the runway state.

The following attributes are set:

functions that return text representations of conditions for output

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.report_type
documentation: Return a textual description of the report type.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.wind
documentation:
Return a textual description of the wind conditions.

Units may be specified as "MPS", "KT", "KMH", or "MPH".

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.peak_wind
documentation:
Return a textual description of the peak wind conditions.

Units may be specified as "MPS", "KT", "KMH", or "MPH".

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.wind_shift
documentation:
Return a textual description of the wind shift time

Units may be specified as "MPS", "KT", "KMH", or "MPH".

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.visibility
documentation:
Return a textual description of the visibility.

Units may be statute miles ("SM") or meters ("M").

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.runway_visual_range
documentation: Return a textual description of the runway visual range.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.present_weather
documentation: Return a textual description of the present weather.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.recent_weather
documentation: Return a textual description of the recent weather.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar._weather
documentation: Return a textual description of weather.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.sky_conditions
documentation: Return a textual description of the sky conditions.

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.trend
documentation: Return the trend forecast groups

methods.name: metar.Metar.Metar.remarks
documentation: Return the decoded remarks.
